---
id: revoke-oidc-session

description:
  "This endpoint initiates and completes user logout at the Ory OAuth2 & OpenID provider and initiates OpenID Connect Front- /
  Back-channel logout:"
sidebar_label: "OpenID Connect Front- and Back-channel Enabled Logout"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint"
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails"
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema"
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes"
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs"
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem"
import Heading from "@theme/Heading"
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"OpenID Connect Front- and Back-channel Enabled Logout"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/oauth2/sessions/logout"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This endpoint initiates and completes user logout at the Ory OAuth2 & OpenID provider and initiates OpenID Connect Front- /
Back-channel logout:

https://openid.net/specs/openid-connect-frontchannel-1_0.html https://openid.net/specs/openid-connect-backchannel-1_0.html

Back-channel logout is performed asynchronously and does not affect logout flow.

<ParamsDetails></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema {...require("./revoke-oidc-session.RequestSchema.json")}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes {...require("./revoke-oidc-session.StatusCodes.json")}></StatusCodes>
